name: Xiaochang Li
title: Distributed Systems & Infrastructure Engineer
description: Building reliable distributed systems that are measurable, reproducible, and operable
seeking: 2027 new grad SWE roles, especially infrastructure, distributed systems, and platform engineering
about:
I'm a Carnegie Mellon M.S. student and software engineer focused on infrastructure, distributed systems, reliability, and performance engineering.

My recent work centers on replayable expert systems for distributed job diagnosis: deterministic rules handle known failures, bounded AI reasoning covers the unknown, and missed cases feed a tested, human-gated rule-evolution loop.

I also enjoy low-level performance work, CI/CD automation, and building systems whose behavior can be measured, reproduced, and trusted.
